data.title: Ascencio SCA Reports Steady Growth and ESG Advancements Amid Economic Uncertainties
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Ascencio SCA ( (GB:0P2J) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Ascencio SCA has reported positive operational results for the first quarter of the 2024/2025 fiscal year, with rental income and EPRA earnings showing modest growth. The company has maintained a high occupancy rate and managed its debt effectively, resulting in a strong financial position. Ascencio is actively pursuing its ESG commitments with the commissioning of electric vehicle charging stations and solar panel installations. Despite external economic uncertainties, the company continues to make strategic investments and manage its portfolio effectively.

More about Ascencio SCA

Ascencio SCA operates in the real estate sector, primarily focused on managing a portfolio of rental properties in Europe. The company is engaged in leasing, property investment, and maintaining an emphasis on environmental, social, and governance (ESG) initiatives.

data.title: Medigene AG Updates Total Voting Rights to 14.9 Million
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An update from Medigene ( (DE:MDG1) ) is now available.

Medigene AG has announced a new total number of voting rights, now amounting to 14,887,594, effective from February 18, 2025. This announcement reflects a capital measure under Article 41 of the WpHG, potentially impacting shareholders and stakeholders by altering the distribution of voting power within the company.

More about Medigene

Medigene AG is a biotechnology company based in Planegg/Martinsried, Germany. The company operates in the regulated markets of Frankfurt and free markets across several German cities, focusing on innovative therapeutic solutions.

Paragon Banking Group PLC ( (GB:PAG) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Paragon Banking Group PLC has executed a share buyback program, purchasing 119,477 of its own ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange. This acquisition is part of a larger buyback initiative worth up to £50 million, aiming to optimize capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value. The transaction signifies the company’s strategic commitment to managing its equity base, which could positively influence market perceptions and investor confidence.

data.title: POSCO Cancels 1.69 Million Treasury Shares to Boost Shareholder Value
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest announcement is out from POSCO ( (PKX) ).

POSCO Holdings Inc. announced the cancellation of 1,691,425 treasury shares, which accounts for 2% of the total issued shares, as resolved by the Board of Directors on February 19, 2025. This move, scheduled for completion by March 31, 2025, is part of a strategic plan to manage company shares without reducing capital, potentially strengthening shareholder value and market perception.

More about POSCO

POSCO Holdings Inc. is a leading company in the steel industry, known for producing a range of steel products. Based in Seoul, Korea, the company focuses on delivering high-quality steel solutions to meet the demands of various global markets.

data.title: NGEx Minerals Extends High-Grade Mineralization at Lunahuasi Project
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An update from NGEx Minerals ( (TSE:NGEX) ) is now available.

NGEx Minerals has announced significant progress in its Phase 3 drilling program at the Lunahuasi project in Argentina, with new results indicating substantial mineralization over a north-south extent of over 1,000 meters. The latest drill results have extended the mineralized system, showcasing high-grade copper-gold-silver intersections, and suggesting a large size potential for the Lunahuasi deposit, which remains open in all directions, signaling strong growth potential.

More about NGEx Minerals

NGEx Minerals Ltd. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of high-grade copper, gold, and silver projects. The company is particularly active in the San Juan region of Argentina, where it owns the Lunahuasi project.

data.title: Cambi Secures Fifth Spanish Contract for Advanced THP System
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Cambi ASA ( (DE:3W7) ) just unveiled an update.

Cambi has secured a contract to deliver its thermal hydrolysis process (THP) system for the new Silvouta wastewater treatment plant in Santiago de Compostela, Spain, marking its fifth installation in the country. This system, part of a sustainable collaboration with a consortium including Espina, Obrascon, and Aquambiente, aims to optimize biogas production, improve sludge dewatering, and produce high-quality biosolids for agricultural use, aligning with the plant’s goal to generate energy for internal consumption and serving a population of around 250,000 residents.

More about Cambi ASA

Cambi is a global biogas technology and solutions supplier for wastewater treatment plants and anaerobic digestion facilities. Since 1992, it has maintained market leadership through innovation and a robust portfolio of patented technologies, delivering installations across 28 countries on six continents. Cambi’s thermal hydrolysis process enhances renewable energy output, reduces operational costs, and minimizes greenhouse gas emissions, adaptable for all biosolids outlets and compliant with sludge and waste treatment regulations.

YTD Price Performance: 33.06%

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: €264M

Atmus Filtration Technologies, Inc. ( (ATMU) ) has provided an update.

On February 19, 2025, Atmus Filtration Technologies announced that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.05 per common share, to be paid on March 19, 2025, to shareholders on record as of March 4, 2025. This move reflects the company’s commitment to delivering shareholder value, potentially strengthening its market position and signaling financial stability to stakeholders.

More about Atmus Filtration Technologies, Inc.

Atmus Filtration Technologies Inc. is a global leader in filtration and media solutions, serving diverse markets including truck, bus, agriculture, construction, mining, marine, and power generation. With over 65 years of experience, the company operates on six continents and provides comprehensive aftermarket support and solutions.

data.title: Pulsar Helium Joins 2025 TSX Venture 50
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Pulsar Helium, Inc. ( (TSE:PLSR) ) has issued an announcement.

Pulsar Helium Inc. has been recognized in the 2025 TSX Venture 50 list, ranking 20th for its significant achievements in 2024, marking its first full year on the TSX Venture Exchange. The inclusion highlights Pulsar’s strategic advancements, such as successful private placements and drillings at its Topaz project, which supports its growth trajectory. This recognition underscores Pulsar’s operational progress and potential in the helium market, bolstered by recent resource estimations and industry partnerships, which are expected to enhance shareholder value and meet increasing helium demand.

More about Pulsar Helium, Inc.

Pulsar Helium Inc. is a publicly traded company active in the helium project development industry, listed on the AIM market of the London Stock Exchange, the TSX Venture Exchange, and the OTCQB. The company focuses on helium projects, including its flagship Topaz helium project in Minnesota, USA, and the Tunu helium project in Greenland, and positions itself as a first mover in these locations with primary helium occurrences not linked to hydrocarbon production.
